## Verses (18)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | We then, working together with God, make our request to you not to take the grace of God to no purpose. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | (For he says, I have given ear to you at a good time, and I have been your helper in a day of salvation: see, now is the good time; now is the day of salvation): | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Giving no cause for trouble in anything, so that no one may be able to say anything against our work; | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | But in everything making it clear that we are the servants of God, in quiet strength, in troubles, in need, in sorrow, | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | In blows, in prisons, in attacks, in hard work, in watchings, in going without food; | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | In a clean heart, in knowledge, in long waiting, in being kind, in the Holy Spirit, in true love, | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | In the true word, in the power of God; with the arms of righteousness on the right hand and on the left, | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | By glory and by shame, by an evil name and a good name; as untrue, and still true; | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Unnoted, but still kept fully in mind; as near to death, but still living; as undergoing punishment, but not put to death; | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | As full of sorrow, but ever glad; as poor, but giving wealth to others; as having nothing, but still having all things. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Our mouth is open to you, O Corinthians, our heart is wide. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | It is not our feelings to you which are narrow, but yours to us. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Now to give me back payment of the same sort (I am talking as to my children), let your hearts be wide open to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Do not keep company with those who have not faith: for what is there in common between righteousness and evil, or between light and dark? | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | And what agreement is there between Christ and the Evil One? or what part has one who has faith with one who has not? | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | And what agreement has the house of God with images? for we are a house of the living God; even as God has said, I will be living among them, and walking with them; and I will be their God, and they will be my people. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | For which cause, Come out from among them, and be separate, says the Lord, and let no unclean thing come near you; and I will take you for myself, | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | And will be a Father to you; and you will be my sons and daughters, says the Lord, the Ruler of all. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
